name: java-cobol-banking-system
description: A hybrid banking system simulation integrating legacy COBOL programs with a modern Java (Spring Boot) backend and a Tailwind CSS frontend. It handles authentication and transactions using relational databases instead of flat files, all orchestrated with Docker

name: erickfierro.github.io
description: A responsive, multilingual developer portfolio application built with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It includes built-in internationalization handling, a robust theme provider for dark/light mode toggling

name: cobol-sales-statistics-calculator
description: A hybrid Python and COBOL data pipeline that extracts sales entries from spreadsheets and calculates business metrics using a core batch processor

name: reportal
description: A core backend application written in COBOL designed for automated report generation and batch data processing. The repository features a clean structure optimized for compiling local executable binaries

name: Pokedex
description: An interactive and responsive Pokédex built with HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript using the PokéAPI. It allows users to explore Pokémon, filter them dynamically by type, and view their essential characteristics
